name: @luckybugqqq/claw-sama
description: VRM avatar desktop pet plugin for OpenClaw

scripts.bump: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=process.argv[1];if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run bump <version>');process.exit(1)}const f='package.json';const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));p.version=v;for(const k of Object.keys(p.optionalDependencies||{}))p.optionalDependencies[k]=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Bumped to '+v)" --
